sentences.arabic: يَصِفُ الْأَدِيبُ جَمَالَ الطَّبِيعَةِ فِي كِتَابِهِ الْجَدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Književnik opisuje ljepotu prirode u svojoj novoj knjizi.
sentences.translationEn: The writer describes the beauty of nature in his new book.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ إِنَّ الشَّمْسَ تَغِيبُ مِثْلَ ذَهَبٍ يَنْزِلُ فِي الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Kaže da sunce zalazi poput zlata koje se spušta u more.
sentences.translationEn: He says that the sun sets like gold descending into the sea.

sentences.arabic: وَيَصِفُ الْأَزْهَارَ بِأَنَّهَا تَبْتَسِمُ لِلصَّبَاحِ الْهَادِئِ.
sentences.translation: Opisuje cvijeće kao da se osmjehuje mirnom jutru.
sentences.translationEn: He describes the flowers as smiling at the calm morning.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا النَّوْعُ مِنَ الْكِتَابَةِ يُسَمَّى الْوَصْفَ الْأَدَبِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Ova vrsta pisanja naziva se književni opis.
sentences.translationEn: This type of writing is called literary description.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ قِرَاءَةَ هَذِهِ الْكَلِمَاتِ لِأَنَّهَا تَبْعَثُ السَّلَامَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi vole čitati ove riječi jer donose mir.
sentences.translationEn: People love reading these words because they bring peace.
